channel.title: GitHub QML Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of QML in GitHub

item.title: Swordfish90/cool-retro-term
item.description: A good looking terminal emulator which mimics the old cathode display...

item.title: wsdfhjxc/virtual-desktop-bar
item.description: KDE Plasma panel applet for managing virtual desktops

item.title: vinceliuice/WhiteSur-kde
item.description: MacOS big sur theme for kde plasma

item.title: jaredtao/TaoQuick
item.description: a cool QtQuick/qml component library and demo(一套酷炫的QtQuick/Qml基础库和示例)
